docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAYSMITH, MELANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANDY, MARK PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY GRAYSMITH, MELANIE AS TO DEFENDANT BANDY, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-24-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED FEB-13-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BANDY, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-24-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
